englishSourceLexicon.name: English Speller Database / SCOWL level 60
englishSourceLexicon.parameters: word-list 60 A,B,Z 1 --deaccent; lowercase; ASCII words length >= 3

optionalContextCorpora.name: English and Russian Wikipedia
optionalContextCorpora.input: UTF-8 JSONL supplied with --corpus-jsonl; exact dump URL and SHA-256 must be added before a release model is trained

optionalContextCorpora.name: Tatoeba English and Russian sentences
optionalContextCorpora.input: UTF-8 JSONL supplied with --corpus-jsonl; exact snapshot URL and SHA-256 must be added before a release model is trained

trainingRun.note: int8 export was rejected by the active simulator after quantizer scale warnings; shadow rollout remains mandatory. The SCOWL source lexicon is a deterministic runtime gate and was not used to train this Core ML artifact.
